mapper.select: SELECT FN_WM_ALLGRKY() FROM DUAL

select concat(ST.COMPKEY , ST.STOCKKY) as ROWKEY , ST.COMPKEY , ST.STOCKKY , #{taskoky} as TASKOKY , #{taskoit} as TASKOIT , ST.WAREKEY , ST.TRUNTYP , ST.TRUNPID , ST.LOTNMKY , ST.OWNERKY , (select OWNAMLC from MOWRMA where COMPKEY = ST.COMPKEY and OWNERKY = ST.OWNERKY ) as OWNAMLC , ST.SKUMKEY , ST.SKUDESC , ST.AREAKEY , ST.ZONEKEY , ST.LOCAKEY , (select AREANAM from MAREMA MA where ST.COMPKEY = MA.COMPKEY and ST.WAREKEY = MA.WAREKEY and ST.AREAKEY = MA.AREAKEY ) as AREANAM , (select ZONENAM from MZONMA MZ where ST.COMPKEY = MZ.COMPKEY and ST.WAREKEY = MZ.WAREKEY and ST.AREAKEY = MZ.AREAKEY and ST.ZONEKEY = MZ.ZONEKEY ) as ZONENAM , (select LOCANAM from MLOCMA ML where ST.COMPKEY = ML.COMPKEY and ST.WAREKEY = ML.WAREKEY and ST.AREAKEY = ML.AREAKEY and ST.ZONEKEY = ML.ZONEKEY and ST.LOCAKEY = ML.LOCAKEY ) as LOCANAM , ST.SUOMKEY , ST.SIRBCOD , ST.PRODDAT , ST.SHELIFE , fn_com_todate(ST.EXPIDAT) as EXPIDAT , ST.LOTFRKY , ST.LOTAT01 , ST.LOTAT02 , ST.LOTAT03 , ST.LOTAT04 , ST.LOTAT05 , ST.LOTAT06 , ST.LOTAT07 , ST.LOTAT08 , ST.LOTAT09 , ST.LOTAT10 , ST.LOTAT11 , ST.LOTAT12 , ST.LOTAT13 , ST.LOTAT14 , ST.LOTAT15 , ST.LOTAT16 , ST.LOTAT17 , ST.LOTAT18 , ST.LOTAT19 , ST.LOTAT20 , ST.RCVDCKY , ST.RCVDCIT , ST.STKSTAT , ST.STOTQTY , 0 as TCHNQTY from WSTKKY ST ST.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and ST.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and ST.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} and ST.SKUMKEY = #{skumkey} and ST.AREAKEY = 'STG' and ST.STOTQTY > 0 and ST.SINBQTY = 0 and ST.SOUBQTY = 0 and ST.SBLOQTY = 0
group by ST.STOCKKY
SELECT FN_WM_TASKOKY() FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: insert into WTAKIT ( COMPKEY , STORFKY , TASKOKY , TASKOIT , POSTDAT , TASKSTS , WAREKEY , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , TRUNTYP , TRUNPID , PICKTYP , LOTNMKY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , FRAREKY , FRZONKY , FRLOCKY , TOAREKY , TOZONKY , TOLOCKY , FORDQTY , FUOMEKY , TCMPQTY , TUOMEKY , SIRBCOD , PRODDAT , SHELIFE , EXPIDAT , RCVDCDT , RCVFRDT , LOTFRKY , LOTAT01 , LOTAT02 , LOTAT03 , LOTAT04 , LOTAT05 , LOTAT06 , LOTAT07 , LOTAT08 , LOTAT09 , LOTAT10 , LOTAT11 , LOTAT12 , LOTAT13 , LOTAT14 , LOTAT15 , LOTAT16 , LOTAT17 , LOTAT18 , LOTAT19 , LOTAT20 , RCVDCKY , RCVDCIT , SHPDCKY , SHPDCIT , ALLGRKY , COOUTKY , COOUTIT , OERETKY , OERETIT , STKSTAT , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey} , #{stockky} , #{newTaskoky} , 1 , FN_WM_POSDATE(#{userData.compkey} , #{warekey}) , "NEW" , #{warekey} , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , #{truntyp} , #{trunpid} , #{picktyp} , #{lotnmky} , #{ownerky} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{areakey} , #{zonekey} , #{locakey} , #{toareky} , #{tozonky} , #{tolocky} , #{tchnqty} , #{suomkey} , 0 , #{suomkey} , #{sirbcod} , replace(#{proddat}, '-', '') , #{shelife} , replace(#{expidat}, '-', '') , replace(#{rcvdcdt}, '-', '') , replace(#{rcvfrdt}, '-', '') , #{lotfrky} , #{lotat01} , #{lotat02} , #{lotat03} , #{lotat04} , #{lotat05} , #{lotat06} , #{lotat07} , #{lotat08} , #{lotat09} , #{lotat10} , #{lotat11} , #{lotat12} , #{lotat13} , #{lotat14} , #{lotat15} , #{lotat16} , #{lotat17} , #{lotat18} , #{lotat19} , #{lotat20} , #{rcvdcky} , #{rcvdcit} , #{shpdcky} , #{shpdcit} , #{allgrky} , #{cooutky} , #{cooutit} , #{oeretky} , #{oeretit} , #{stkstat} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} , to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now(), 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
select concat(SH.COMPKEY, SH.WAREKEY, SH.ALLGRKY, TS.PICKTYP) as ROWKEY , TS.COMPKEY, TS.WAREKEY , TS.DOCCATE, TS.DOCTYPE , (select DOCTYNM from MDOCMA where COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY and DOCCATE = SH.DOCCATE and DOCTYPE = SH.DOCTYPE and WAREKEY = SH.WAREKEY) as DOCTYNM , (select OWNAMLC from MOWRMA where COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY and OWNERKY = SH.OWNERKY ) as OWNAMLC , (SELECT CDCATE1 FROM V_MCODEM WHERE COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY AND COMCDKY = 'TASKSTS' AND COMCDVL = TS.TASKSTS) AS SHPDCST , TS.SHPDCKY, TS.SHPDCIT , SUM(TS.DIFFQTY) AS DIFFQTY , COUNT(DISTINCT TS.SKUMKEY) AS SKKYCNT , TS.ALLGRKY , TS.PICKTYP , TS.TASKSTS , TS.SKUMKEY , TS.COOUTKY , TS.COOUTIT , SH.DESTKEY , (select denamlc from MDESMA WHERE COMPKEY = SH.COMPKEY and PTNRKEY = SH.CUSTKEY and DESTKEY = SH.DESTKEY) as DENAMLC , SH.SHCUQTY , SH.RGITQTY , SH.SHALQTY , SUM(TS.FORDQTY) AS FORDQTY , SUM(TS.TCMPQTY) AS TCMPQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN TS.TASKSTS = 'SHPOUT' THEN TS.TCMPQTY ELSE 0 END) AS SOUTQTY , fn_com_todate(min(TS.CREDATE)) as SHSDATE , fn_com_totime(min(TS.CRETIME)) as SHSTIME , fn_com_todate(max(TS.LMODATE)) as SHEDATE , fn_com_totime(max(TS.LMOTIME)) as SHETIME , max(TS.LMOUSER) as SHEUSER , fn_sy_usernam(SH.COMPKEY, max(TS.LMOUSER)) as SHENAME FROM WSHPIT SH INNER JOIN WTAKIT TS ON SH.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY AND SH.WAREKEY = TS.WAREKEY AND SH.COOUTKY = TS.COOUTKY AND SH.COOUTIT = TS.COOUTIT AND SH.SHPDCKY = TS.SHPDCKY AND SH.SHPDCIT = TS.SHPDCIT
AND TS.TASKSTS not in ('CANCEL', 'TASK')
AND TS.TASKSTS not in ('CANCEL' , 'SHPOUT')
AND TS.DOCCATE = '500' AND TS.DOCTYPE = '530'
and TS.PICKTYP = #{picktyp}
AND trim(TS.ALLGRKY) like concat('%',#{allgrky},'%')
AND TS.ALLGRKY IN ( SELECT DISTINCT(TS.ALLGRKY) FROM WSHPIT SH INNER JOIN WTAKIT TS ON SH.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY AND SH.WAREKEY = TS.WAREKEY AND SH.SHPDCKY = TS.SHPDCKY AND SH.SHPDCIT = TS.SHPDCIT
AND TS.TASKSTS not in ('CANCEL', 'TASK')
AND TS.TASKSTS not in ('CANCEL' , 'SHPOUT')
AND TS.DOCCATE = '500' AND TS.DOCTYPE = '530' WHERE SH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND SH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND SH.DOCCATE = '700' AND SH.DOCTYPE not in ('780', '781')
AND SH.SHPPDAY between #{shsdatefrom} and #{shsdateto}
and TS.ALLGRKY = #{allgrky}
and TS.PICKTYP = #{picktyp}
AND TS.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} )
WHERE SH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND SH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND SH.DOCCATE = '700' AND SH.DOCTYPE not in ('780', '781')
AND SH.SHPPDAY BETWEEN #{shsdatefrom} AND #{shsdateto}
GROUP BY TS.COMPKEY, TS.WAREKEY, TS.DOCCATE, TS.DOCTYPE, TS.ALLGRKY, TS.PICKTYP, TS.SHPDCKY, TS.SHPDCIT, TS.COOUTKY, TS.COOUTIT ORDER BY TS.ALLGRKY ASC, SH.COOUTKY ASC , (CASE WHEN TS.OWNERKY = #{ownerky} THEN 1 ELSE 9 END), SH.COOUTIT ASC
SELECT FN_OM_COOUTKY() FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OCOSAL ( COMPKEY , COOUTKY , COOUTIT , DOCCATE , DOCTYPE , POSTDAT , SALDATE , SALTIME , TOWARKY , CUSTKEY , SKUSKEY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , DESTKEY , OWNERKY , SALSTAT , SAATC06 , SALMEMO , SALRQDT , SALRQTM , SOITQTY , RGITQTY , SUOMKEY , CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER ) VALUES ( #{userData.compkey} , #{cooutky} , FN_OM_COOUTIT(#{userData.compkey} , #{cooutky}) , #{doccate} , #{doctype} , FN_WM_POSDATE(#{userData.compkey} , #{warekey}) , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s') , #{warekey} , #{custkey} , #{skuskey} , #{skumkey} , #{skudesc} , #{destkey} , #{ownerky} , #{salstat} , #{saatc06} , #{salmemo}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s'), #{rgitqty} , #{rgitqty} , #{suomkey} , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW() , '%H%i%s') , #{userData.useract} )
